label: CMake: Configure Project
command: cmake -B build -S . -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DBUILD_FOR_LINUX=ON -DBUILD_JNI_LIB=OFF -DUSE_ASN1C_LTE=ON -DUSE_ASN1C_UMTS=ON -DBUILD_EFS_BROWSE=OFF -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS="-include stddef.h -include sys/types.h" -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-include stddef.h -include sys/types.h" && ln -sf build/compile_commands.json .

label: CMake: Clean Rebuild
command: rm -rf build && rm -f compile_commands.json && cmake -B build -S . -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=ON -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DBUILD_FOR_LINUX=ON -DBUILD_JNI_LIB=OFF -DUSE_ASN1C_LTE=ON -DUSE_ASN1C_UMTS=ON -DBUILD_EFS_BROWSE=OFF -DCMAKE_C_FLAGS="-include stddef.h -include sys/types.h" -DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS="-include stddef.h -include sys/types.h" && cmake --build build -j$(nproc) && ln -sf build/compile_commands.json .

label: Linter: Run Clang-Tidy (Check All)
command: FILES=$(find . -type d \( -name build -o -name .zed -o -name .git \) -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.cc' \) -print) && if [ -n "$FILES" ]; then echo "$FILES" | xargs clang-tidy -p build; else echo "Исходные файлы не найдены"; fi

label: Formatter: Format Code (Clang-Format)
command: find . -type d \( -name build -o -name .zed -o -name .git \) -prune -o -type f \( -name '*.cpp' -o -name '*.h' -o -name '*.hpp' -o -name '*.cc' \) -print0 | xargs -0 -r clang-format -i
